Why didn't the indophenol change color with Fruitsnap?
reference_answer: Fruitsnap contains little or no vitamin C so Fruitsnap does not change the color of the indophenol.
student_answer: Fruitsnap probably contains no vitamin C.
label: correct

question: What process forms deltas? A. Gravity B. Erosion (C. Deposition) D. Decomposition.  Explain how deltas form.

student_answer: 40 meters, I know this because contour intervals do not change and 20 plus 20 equals 40.

Sharice did the same thing in her room to measure the space for the rug. Her floor was 18 shoes long and 12 shoes wide. A perfect fit! Sharice bought the rug and took it home. To her dismay, she found it was too short and too narrow for her bedroom! What could Mary and Sharice do to better measure the size of the rug?
reference_answer: Use a standard unit of measurement such as centimeters or meters.
student_answer: Use a meter tape.
label: correct

They painted the plastic containers black, filled each with the same amount of water, and put a clear plastic lid on each one. Then they set them out in the sunshine. (6 Celsius) How did you decide what the temperature change would be for the new container?

Here are the data that Cory and Rachael collected: After 10 minutes Container A was 3 degrees Celsius, Container B was 9 degrees Celsius, and Container C was 12 degrees Celsius. (6 Celsius) How did you decide what the temperature change would be for the new container?
reference_answer: 20 centimeters size is between 10 and 30 centimeters, so the temperature change must be less than the 30 centimeters container, but more than the 10 centimeters container. 6 degrees Celsius is halfway between.

question: 3 girls wanted to see who could throw a ball the farthest. Each girl brought her favorite ball to the park. Ling took 2 steps up to the line and threw her basketball. Diana stood at the line and threw her football. Rachael got a running start and threw her baseball when she reached the line. Rachael threw her ball the farthest. What variable did the girls control in the contest?
reference_answer: The launch position (line on the playground) is the variable that is controlled.
student_answer: Where she threw the ball.
